title: rosa lucieae var. onoei
intro: Rosa lucieae var. onoei, also known as the Japanese rose or Rosa lucieae variety Onoei, is a species of rose native to Japan, characterized by its fragrant flowers and thorny stems. The medicinal properties of Rosa lucieae var. onoei include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of using Rosa lucieae var. onoei include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Japanese medicine. Rosa lucieae var. onoei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
